program_type.source_quote: The Cybersecurity Certificate prepares students to recognize Cybersecurity threats and implement procedures to protect computers, networks, programs and data from unintended or unauthorized access, change or destruction.

program_focus.value: Defensive Cyber Operations, Offensive Cyber Operations
program_focus.source_quote: Demonstrate competency applying Cybersecurity fundamentals and best practices in various computing platforms and infrastructure. Demonstrate competency in using various cybersecurity tools related to secure architecture, vulnerability management, intrusion detection and prevention, and incident response.

program_focus_details.value: The Cybersecurity Certificate prepares students to recognize Cybersecurity threats and implement procedures to protect computers, networks, programs and data from unintended or unauthorized access, change or destruction.
program_focus_details.source_quote: The Cybersecurity Certificate prepares students to recognize Cybersecurity threats and implement procedures to protect computers, networks, programs and data from unintended or unauthorized access, change or destruction.

program_level.source_quote: The Cybersecurity Certificate prepares students to recognize Cybersecurity threats and implement procedures to protect computers, networks, programs and data from unintended or unauthorized access, change or destruction.

num_courses.source_quote: Required courses are listed in suggested sequence: (17 units) CIS 190 C IT and Cybersecurity Funds 4 CIS 230 C Cisco Networking 1 4 CIS 195 C Network Security 3 CIS 196 C Ethical Hacking 3 CIS 247 C Python Programming 3

courses.value: IT and Cybersecurity Funds, Cisco Networking 1, Network Security, Ethical Hacking, Python Programming
courses.source_quote: CIS 190 C IT and Cybersecurity Funds 4 CIS 230 C Cisco Networking 1 4 CIS 195 C Network Security 3 CIS 196 C Ethical Hacking 3 CIS 247 C Python Programming 3

notable_courses.value:
Required Courses:
CIS 190 C: IT and Cybersecurity Funds
CIS 230 C: Cisco Networking 1
CIS 195 C: Network Security

notable_courses.source_quote: Code Title Units Required courses are listed in suggested sequence: (17 units) CIS 190 C IT and Cybersecurity Funds 4 CIS 230 C Cisco Networking 1 4 CIS 195 C Network Security 3 CIS 196 C Ethical Hacking 3 CIS 247 C Python Programming 3

class_duration.source_quote: This certificate requires a total of 17 units.

cost_per_class_short.source_quote: Enrollment Fee: $46 per unit (Waived for CCPG recipients)

cost_per_class_long.source_quote: Non-Resident Fees: $396 per unit, plus $25 capital outlay fee per Ed Code 76141

program_managed_by.source_quote: Division: Business and Computer Information Systems

cert_prep.value: Yes, prepares for ITF+, A+, Security+, and CySA+.
cert_prep.source_quote: It will also enhance students' chances to pursue a professional career in Cybersecurity by preparing them for industry-recognized certificates such as ITF+, A+, Security+, and CySA+.

cert_graduation_requirements.value: To earn a certificate, complete the required courses as listed with a grade of C or better. At least 50% of all course work must be completed at Cypress College.
cert_graduation_requirements.source_quote: To earn a certificate, complete the required courses as listed with a grade of C or better. At least 50% of all course work must be completed at Cypress College.

program_type.source_quote: The Cyber Defense Certificate provides concepts and hands-on skills to identify Cybersecurity threats and implement procedures to protect Cyber assets.

program_focus.value: Network Security, Ethical Hacking, Cisco Networking, System Administration, DevSecOps, Cloud Computing
program_focus.source_quote: Required core courses (8 units): CIS 190 C IT and Cybersecurity Funds 4 CIS 230 C Cisco Networking 1 4 Elective core courses (9 units) CIS 195 C Network Security 3 CIS 196 C Ethical Hacking 3 CIS 247 C Python Programming 3

program_focus_details.value: The Cyber Defense Certificate provides concepts and hands-on skills to identify Cybersecurity threats and implement procedures to protect Cyber assets. It will also enhance students' chances to pursue a professional career in Cybersecurity by giving them various options to prepare for industry-recognized certificates such as CompTIA ITF+, Network+, Security+, CySA+, Project+, Cisco CCNA and CyberOps, and AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner and Certified Solutions Architect – Associate.
program_focus_details.source_quote: The Cyber Defense Certificate provides concepts and hands-on skills to identify Cybersecurity threats and implement procedures to protect Cyber assets. It will also enhance students' chances to pursue a professional career in Cybersecurity by giving them various options to prepare for industry-recognized certificates such as CompTIA ITF+, Network+, Security+, CySA+, Project+, Cisco CCNA and CyberOps, and AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner and Certified Solutions Architect – Associate.

program_level.source_quote: The Cyber Defense Certificate provides concepts and hands-on skills to identify Cybersecurity threats and implement procedures to protect Cyber assets.

num_courses.source_quote: Complete the required and elective core courses and one area of emphasis (26 to 28 units)

courses.value: CIS 190 C, CIS 230 C, CIS 195 C, CIS 196 C, CIS 247 C, CIS 231 C, CIS 232 C, CIS 233 C, CIS 239 C, CIS 258 C, CIS 164 C, CIS 185 C, CIS 189 C, CIS 243 C, CIS 110 C, CIS 257 C, CIS 226 C, CIS 256 C, CIS 259 C, CIS 274 C, CIS 275 C, CIS 201 C, CIS 202 C
